title: cunoniaceae
intro: The Cunoniaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of flowering plant families. It is a taxonomic rank that contains approximately 33 species of trees and shrubs, primarily native to Australia and New Zealand. Members of the Cunoniaceae family are known for their distinctive flowers, often featuring a red or purple color and a unique shape. This family is also sometimes referred to as the 'bloodwoods' or 'native cherry' due to the bright color of their flowers.
